name: Startup Funding Tracker
description: Track recent startup funding rounds and acquisitions

agents.name: Funding Scanner
agents.system_prompt_hint: Search TechCrunch, Crunchbase news, and startup media for recent funding rounds. Find company names, round sizes, investors, valuations, and what the startup does.

agents.name: Funding Reporter
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a funding report organized by sector. Include: company, round type, amount, key investors, and brief company description. Highlight notable trends and largest rounds.

suggestion_card.title: Startup Tracker
suggestion_card.subtitle: Track startup funding rounds
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Show me this week's startup funding news

author: agentfactory
